zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bostock於1380年出生時，她的父親Adam Bostock17歲，母親Jonet Bradshaw18歲。她於1402年與Hugh Thomas Davenport在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1417年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾亨波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Bostock于1380年出生时，她的父亲Adam Bostock17岁，母亲Jonet Bradshaw18岁。她于1402年与Hugh Thomas Davenport在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1417年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾亨波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bostock was born in 1380, her father, Adam Bostock, was 17 and her mother, Jonet Bradshaw, was 18. She married Hugh Thomas Davenport in 1402, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1417, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bostock est née en 1380, son père, Adam Bostock, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Jonet Bradshaw, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Thomas Davenport en 1402, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bostock 1380 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Bostock 17 und ihre Mutter Jonet Bradshaw 18. Sie hat 1402 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh Thomas Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bostock è nata il nel 1380, sua padre, Adam Bostock, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Jonet Bradshaw, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Thomas Davenport nel 1402, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1417, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Henbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bostockが1380年に生まれた時，父Adam Bostockは17歳，母Jonet Bradshawは18歳であった。1402年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーでHugh Thomas Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1417年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bostock(이)가 1380년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Bostock(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jonet Bradshaw(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 플레스트버이에서 Hugh Thomas Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bostock nasceu em 1380, seu pai, Adam Bostock, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Jonet Bradshaw, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Thomas Davenport em 1402, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1417, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bostock родилась в 1380 г., её отцу по имени Adam Bostock было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonet Bradshaw, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Thomas Davenport в 1402 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Bostock nació en 1380, su papá, Adam Bostock, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Jonet Bradshaw, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Hugh Thomas Davenport en 1402, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1417, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
